appDescription: AgroHelp is a software application that helps farmers manage and optimize their agricultural operations.
empoweringFarmers: Empowering farmers with smart technology for sustainable agriculture
missionDescription: AgroHelp is dedicated to revolutionizing agriculture through innovative technology. We provide farmers with intelligent tools to detect plant diseases early, predict weather patterns, and make informed decisions that lead to healthier crops and better yields.
platformDescription: Our platform combines cutting-edge AI and machine learning to deliver accurate, real-time insights that help farmers protect their investments and contribute to sustainable farming practices.
diseaseDetectionDescription: Advanced AI-powered image recognition to identify plant diseases quickly and accurately.
weatherForecastingDescription: Real-time weather predictions to help you plan farming activities and protect crops.
smartAnalyticsDescription: Data-driven insights to optimize crop management and increase productivity.
userFriendly: User-friendly interface designed for farmers of all tech levels
accuratePredictions: Accurate AI-powered predictions backed by extensive research
regularUpdates: Regular updates with latest agricultural insights
dedicatedSupport: Dedicated support team committed to your success
getInTouch: Get in touch with our team
subject: Subject

pleaseFillInAllProfileDetails: Please fill in all profile details
accessAllAgroHelpSmartFarmingTools: Access all AgroHelp smart farming tools
weatherForecastingGuide: View current weather conditions and 7-day forecasts
mandiRatesGuide: Access real-time agricultural commodity prices from APMC markets
mlWeatherPredictionGuide: Get AI-powered weather predictions for better planning
plantDiseaseDetectionGuide: Upload crop images for instant disease diagnosis
getLiveApmcMandiRates: Get live APMC mandi rates for various crops and commodities to make informed selling decisions.
yourTrustedCompanionForModernFarmingSolu: Your trusted companion for modern farming solutions, combining AI and real-time data to help farmers make informed decisions.
trackLiveApmcMandiRates: Track live APMC mandi rates across multiple markets and districts. Get historical price trends and make informed decisions about when and where to sell your produce for maximum profit.
advancedMachineLearningModels: Advanced machine learning models using RNN and LSTM neural networks to predict long-term weather patterns, helping you plan seasonal activities and mitigate weather-related risks.
simpleAndIntuitiveDesign: Simple and intuitive design accessible to farmers of all technical backgrounds
stateOfTheArtMachineLearningModels: State-of-the-art machine learning models for precise disease detection and weather forecasting
accessInformationInYourPreferredLanguage: Access information in your preferred language for better understanding
liveMarketPricesAndWeatherData: Live market prices and weather data updated continuously
dataDrivenInsightsToOptimize: Data-driven insights to optimize your farming operations and increase profitability
thankYouForYourMessage: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
getRealTimeWeatherUpdates: Get real-time weather updates for any city
checkLiveApmcMandiRates: Check live APMC mandi rates for agricultural commodities

selectOneOrMoreMarkets: Select one or more markets to get price details.
pleaseSelectAtLeastOneMarket: Please select at least one market
pricesArePerQuintal: Prices are per quintal and subject to market fluctuations
ourMarketRatesAreUpdated: Our market rates are updated in real-time from APMC (Agricultural Produce Market Committee) data across major cities in India. These rates help farmers make informed decisions about when and where to sell their produce for the best prices.
weatherPredictionSubtitle: Get AI-powered weather predictions for better planning
